name: Ullis Tapes
description:
Ullis Tapes er tilbake på Verket lørdag 23. mai!

DJ Baby Stinky (Ullis Tapes) returns to Hærverk for another 4 hour vinyl marathon with the exclusive westcoast ruffage exclusive for the eastcoast dwellers!

130,140,150,160,170 bpms in a rising order trough out the night.

Come early for a reel 2 reel listening session, garage and assorted 1991 biz , come mid for the dubs, breaks and techno and come late for the amens.

Drop killer tunes, not bombs!

Jocking 4 world peace!

--

ID: 20
CC: 120,-
